items.title: Commits & Branches
items.description: Both merge and rebase are operations *over* commits and branches; you need that mental model first.

items.title: Conflict Resolution
items.description: Non-trivial merges and rebases produce conflicts; resolving them is its own discipline.

items.title: Git Workflows
items.description: Trunk-based workflows lean on rebase + fast-forward; GitFlow leans on long-lived branches and merges.

items.title: Pull Requests & Reviews
items.description: PRs are where the merge-vs-rebase decision becomes team policy ('squash and merge' vs 'rebase and merge').
